sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22524" key="gnwrimo/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γνωρ-ῐμότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n22524.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">acquaintance</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7.51</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
